headline: Paycom Software (PAYC) Is Up 6.7% After Expanding $2.13 Billion Credit Facility - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: On April 23, 2026, Paycom Software, Inc. and its subsidiaries entered into an amended and restated credit agreement with JPMorgan Chase and other lenders, establishing a senior secured revolving credit facility of up to US$2.13 billion, with an option to request an additional US$0.75 billion and a maturity date of April 23, 2031. This expanded revolving credit facility, secured against the loan parties’ personal property and tied to leverage-based interest margins and covenants, gives Paycom...
